assumptions: The intragroup dividend has already been declared and recognised as an intragroup monetary receivable/payable.

The receivable/payable is between group entities with different functional currencies, so the related foreign exchange differences are not fully eliminated on consolidation and can affect consolidated profit or loss.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge of a recognised intragroup monetary item
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: A recognised intragroup dividend receivable is relevant only through the IFRS 9 exception that allows foreign currency risk on an intragroup monetary item to be a hedged item in consolidated financial statements.
